title: centaurea × grosii
intro: Centaurea × grosii, also known as the hybrid cornflower, is a flowering plant that is a cross between the Cornflower (Centaurea cyanus) and the Montpelier Centaury (Centaurea monticola). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including inflammation, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × grosii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × grosii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
